pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_dind_socket_access/setup_task.sh (defines PROJECT_DIR and creates the Docker project at this path).
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_dind_socket_access/setup_task.sh (docker-compose.yml sets container_name build-agent and export_result/verifier expect that name).
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/secure_dind_socket_access/setup_task.sh (Dockerfile adds user 'agent' and docker-compose runs service as user agent).

privileged_info_summary: Setup_task.sh builds a Docker project in /home/ga/build-agent where docker-compose launches container build-agent as user agent (UID 1000) so the non-root process runs with the correct UID.
